summary: Diagnosed backend crash without code changes: NPE/Hibernate dialect errors are secondary. Root cause is SQL login failure for user sa with password 123456 from application.properties; Windows auth to localhost works and SWP_Nhom3_App exists. Spring cannot open JDBC connection so EntityManagerFactory fails and Tomcat aborts.
current_status: Frontend localhost:3000 up if previously started. Backend down until sa password (or SQL auth) is corrected outside code, or app datasource credentials updated.
